name: Capital Chicken Skillet
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove bones, skin, and all fat from chicken; cut into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a large skillet, heat oil on medium.
3. Brown chicken on all sides.
4. Drain mushrooms and add to the skillet.
5. Stir in flour.
6. Add soup, wine, and water; cook, stirring, about 10 minutes, until sauce thickens.
7. Stir in dry milk powder, salt, tarragon leaves, and black pepper.
8. Drain artichoke hearts.
9. Chop green onions.
10. Mix in artichoke hearts, chopped green onions, and parsley.
11. Heat through and serve over rice. For heartier servings, add frozen green beans or peas after the sauce thickens.
